title: Tiny Mob Farm Remastered
description: Single-block size mob farms that makes mob farming neater and easier.
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Promotion Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ee9630c7-c981-45f9-9862-3a1d71a628bf.webp)](https://redirect.daqem.com?to=https%3A%2F%2Fbisecthosting.com%2FDAQEM%3Fr%3DTinyMobFarmRemasteredModrinth) [![Ko-fi Promotion Banner](https://i.imgur.com/SU7HhbO.png)](https://ko-fi.com/daqem)
#### NOTE: This is a ported version of the original mod called 'Tiny Mob Farm'. Premission to port and use its assets has been given by the original creator. Thank you davidmaamoaix! This mod adds single-block size mob farms that make mob farming neater and easier. ![](https://imgur.com/iLykirr.png) ## Overview: This mod adds different tiers of single-block size mob farms that generates mob loots over time. Different tiers of mob farms have different speed; the Wooden Mob Farm is the lowest tier and the slowest, then the Stone Mob Farm, etc. [![BisectHosting code DAQEM for 25% off!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/bb6b0cc7-75a1-4002-9257-561d8df48142.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/DAQEM?r=TinyMobFarm+CurseForge) ### [I trust BisectHosting with my servers, and you should too! Get 25% off your first month of a gaming server for new customers using DAQEM. They have outstanding support that's always there when you need it.](https://bisecthosting.com/DAQEM?r=TinyMobFarm+CurseForge) ## Instructions: The player needs to capture a mob with the lasso and insert it into a mob farm. The mob farm will start to generate loots of the given mob. Outputs are pushed to adjacent chests. ### Capture: Right-click a mob with a lasso to capture it. ![https://imgur.com/Ob6tUsQ.png](https://imgur.com/Ob6tUsQ.png) ### Mob Farm: Put the lasso in a mob farm to start farming. ![](https://i.imgur.com/L35ZnGL.png) Put a chest under the mob farm to prevent it from spitting out the mob drops. ![](https://i.imgur.com/b8YXRiD.png) Power the mob farm with a redstone signal to turn it off. ![](https://i.imgur.com/6RZvhyy.png) ## Recipes (partial): ### Lasso: ![](https://i.imgur.com/9cfesKh.png) ### Wooden Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/hPHUcOF.png) ### Stone Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/iVXe3li.png) ### Iron Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/gupKpMy.png) ### Gold Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/2plRXd1.png) ### Diamond Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/5Lmnx9R.png) ### Emerald Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/bv9c7SY.png) ### Inferno Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/su1N9Rc.png) ### Ultimate Mob Farm: ![](https://i.imgur.com/mCuv3Fo.png) ## Video Showcase: ### MrBigcheesecake:
